insights: The market is showing a clear upward trajectory, with the current 7-day average (1391) significantly outperforming the 30-day average (1366), signaling sustained hiring momentum.
FAANG+ and Unicorn tiers are showing stabilization and slight growth, which typically acts as a leading indicator for broader market confidence in new graduate hiring.
Data/ML roles are demonstrating the strongest volatility-to-growth ratio, suggesting that companies are prioritizing AI-related talent acquisition despite minor fluctuations in infrastructure roles.
